title: Support - App, user not logged ever, login, dialog, Continue, Cancel
scenario: Guest user who completed onboarding navigates to Support via hamburger menu, clicks App button, then Login, and after clicking Cancel on the login dialog, is returned to the Support section with the Later/Login modal still present.
steps: User who went through onboarding as a Guest navigates to Support via the hamburger menu.
User clicks on the App button.
A login dialog with Cancel and Continue buttons appears.
User clicks Continue to open the login page.
User clicks Cancel (upper left corner) to return to the Poly Support App section.
The Later/Login modal is still present.
expected: Clicking Cancel (upper left corner) returns the user to the Poly Support App section with the Later/Login modal still present.
